---
title: "Reconstructing the Scattering Matrix from Scanning Electron Diffraction Measurements Alone"
type: "article"
author: "P. Pelz, H. G. Brown, J. Ciston, S. D. Findlay, Y. Zhang, M. Scott, C. Ophus"
year: "2020"
publication: "arXiv (Cornell University)"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.48550/arxiv.2008.12768"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - physics
# --- citation metrics (auto-managed; do not edit) ---
cited_by_count: 6
is_oa: true
oa_status: green
counts_by_year:
  - [2014, 0]
  - [2015, 0]
  - [2016, 0]
  - [2017, 0]
  - [2018, 0]
  - [2019, 0]
  - [2020, 1]
  - [2021, 5]
keywords:
  - "Scattering"
  - "Optics"
  - "Diffraction"
  - "Wavefront"
metrics_updated: "2026-05-04T07:24:55Z"
# --- end citation metrics ---
---
## Citation (APA 7)

> Reconstructing the Scattering Matrix from Scanning Electron Diffraction Measurements Alone
P. Pelz, H. G. Brown, J. Ciston, S. D. Findlay, Y. Zhang, M. Scott, C. Ophus
arXiv (Cornell University)


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
